reply_text: Yes sir! Michael Irvin was the reason why I started watching football. I remember as a young fan crying listening to the game on the radio since it wasn't televised that week being from Pittsburgh of all places LOL, the game where he went across the middle in Philly to catch the ball only to hear that he went down on the field and that he wasn't moving and a stretcher had to be called. That ends up being the final play of my favorite players career. Idiot fans in Philly were cheering his injury. Fun fact, live in Pittsburgh never owned a Steelers jersey but most definitely owned a Michael Irvin Jersey, even more to a Steelers game against the Cowboys even wore to a Steelers Cowboys game at Three Rivers Stadium under a Steelers sweatshirt which I later took off and it upset my dad at the time.
